name: aaronclaw
description: Cloudflare-native OpenClaw bootstrap with a Durable Object seam for AaronDB Edge.

scripts.deploy:dry-run: bun run deploy:prep && bun run wrangler deploy --config .wrangler/deploy/wrangler.jsonc --dry-run
scripts.deploy: bun run deploy:prep && bun run wrangler deploy --config .wrangler/deploy/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run test
